config.source:
SELECT
  fs.order_status,
  COALESCE(p.product_category_name, 'Unknown') as product_category,
  COALESCE(c.customer_region, 'Unknown') as customer_region,
  COALESCE(s.seller_region, 'Unknown') as seller_region,
  t.year_month as order_year_month,
  fs.price as revenue,
  fs.order_id,
  fs.freight_value,
  fs.on_time_delivery_flag
FROM
  olist_catalog.olist_gold.fact_sales fs
  LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_products p
    ON fs.product_key = p.product_id
  LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_customers c
    ON fs.customer_key = c.customer_id
  LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_sellers s
    ON fs.seller_key = s.seller_id
  LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_time t
    ON fs.order_date_key = t.date_key

datasets.name: sales_agg
queryLines:
SELECT
  fs.order_status,
  COALESCE(p.product_category_name, 'Unknown') as product_category,
  COALESCE(c.customer_region, 'Unknown') as customer_region,
  COALESCE(s.seller_region, 'Unknown') as seller_region,
  COALESCE(t.year_month, 'Unknown') as order_year_month,
  SUM(fs.price) as total_revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fs.order_id) as order_count,
  AVG(fs.price) as avg_order_value,
  SUM(fs.freight_value) as total_freight,
  AVG(CAST(fs.on_time_delivery_flag AS DOUBLE)) as on_time_delivery_rate
FROM
  olist_catalog.olist_gold.fact_sales fs
    LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_products p
      ON fs.product_key = p.product_id
    LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_customers c
      ON fs.customer_key = c.customer_id
    LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_sellers s
      ON fs.seller_key = s.seller_id
    LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_time t
      ON fs.order_date_key = t.date_key
GROUP BY
  ALL

datasets.name: customer_metrics
queryLines:
SELECT
  fm.campaign_month,
  fm.campaign_year,
  fm.campaign_month_num,
  fm.channel,
  fm.spend_category,
  fm.discount_category,
  fm.quantity,
  fm.ad_spend,
  fm.discount_percent,
  t.year_month as campaign_year_month,
  t.quarter as campaign_quarter
FROM
  olist_catalog.olist_gold.fact_marketing fm
    LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_time t
      ON fm.campaign_date_key = t.date_key

datasets.name: product_metrics
queryLines:
SELECT
  fi.product_category_name as product_category,
  fi.product_key as product_id,
  t.year_month as snapshot_year_month,
  t.year as snapshot_year,
  fi.stock_level,
  fi.stock_status,
  fi.in_stock_flag,
  p.product_name_length,
  p.product_description_length,
  p.product_photos_qty,
  p.product_weight_g,
  p.product_length_cm,
  p.product_height_cm,
  p.product_width_cm
FROM
  olist_catalog.olist_gold.fact_inventory fi
    LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_time t
      ON fi.snapshot_date_key = t.date_key
    LEFT JOIN olist_catalog.olist_gold.dim_products p
      ON fi.product_key = p.product_id

frame.title: On-Time Delivery Rate by Customer Region

lines: Comprehensive sales performance metrics tracking revenue, orders, customer behavior, and delivery performance across Brazil's regions and product categories.
Track advertising spend, campaign performance, channel effectiveness, and promotional discount trends across time periods.
Track product performance, category trends, inventory movement, delivery efficiency, and seller distribution across the catalog.
